raw_consumer_statement:
I want the company to respond on the CFPB Website. It is inappropriate for CFPB to give Citi permission to respond outside of this complaint portal. I am not concerned about privacy.. My former complaint was closed without an answer from Citi XXXX XXXX. 

A purchase was made in the amount of {$58.00} on XX/XX/2024. We filed a dispute to retract the payment. XXXX We need details about the transaction and dispute resolution? Identify the bank, account number and owner that received the initial payment? Provide details about the Merchants response and credit received for the dispute.

CFPB wrote : " The company sent its response directly to you and provided a copy to the CFPB. It may take a few days for you to receive the companys response. To protect consumer privacy, the CFPB has not included the companys response in this consumer portal. You can contact the company at ( XXXX ) XXXX about its response to this complaint. ''
